arguments.Description: "Added timeout limit and fallback mock position to _getUserLocation to prevent Geolocator hangs (ANRs) on the emulator."
arguments.Instruction: "Implement a 4-second timeout and mock position fallback in _getUserLocation."
arguments.TargetContent: "      Position position = await Geolocator.getCurrentPosition(\n        desiredAccuracy: LocationAccuracy.high\n      );"
